overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a leather jacket walking along a rainy London waterfront at night. The character performs a combat takedown near a cafe with purple neon lights before continuing along the Thames promenade with Tower Bridge visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor cafe seating with purple neon lighting

events.description: ego character performs a stealth takedown on a pedestrian against the cafe wall
ego turns right corner leaving the covered cafe seating area

agents.ego_description: subduing a pedestrian in a combat takedown then walking along the wooden deck past outdoor tables

notable_agents.action: pedestrian being subdued by ego in a combat takedown against the brick wall

entered.detail: retractable awning with bright purple LED strip lighting along the cafe front
red brick exterior wall with large windows of the riverside cafe
round metal cafe tables with green chairs arranged on the deck
stacked metal beer kegs near the cafe entrance
wooden plank flooring of the outdoor seating area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night outside a cafe with distinctive purple neon lighting. The ego character performs a combat takedown on a pedestrian against the brick wall, then continues walking along the wooden deck past metal tables and stacked barrels before turning the corner to exit the sheltered seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with bridge view

events.description: exits covered cafe area into open riverside promenade exposed to rain
Tower Bridge becomes visible in the background across the river

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved waterfront path with the river to the left, observing the bridge view

entered.detail: illuminated suspension bridge with two towers spanning the river Thames
black metal railing along the water edge with life preservers attached
distant city lights and buildings visible across the river
large beige patio umbrellas over outdoor seating areas

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the sheltered cafe into the open waterfront promenade, immediately exposed to the heavy rain. Tower Bridge becomes visible in the distance across the Thames as the character walks along the paved path, passing outdoor umbrellas and metal railings along the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside walkway with potted plants and historic warehouses

events.description: ego character turns around and walks back toward the camera direction
pedestrian with black umbrella passes close to camera briefly blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking along the promenade passing other pedestrians, some carrying umbrellas to shield from the rain

notable_agents.action: woman in gray jacket walking with a black umbrella
man in dark clothing walking with black umbrella

entered.detail: large square planters with palm trees and greenery
multi-story red brick industrial building with metal balconies
ornate black street lamps with warm yellow light illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the open waterfront promenade, passing pedestrians with umbrellas walking in the opposite direction. Potted trees line the left side while a historic brick warehouse building runs along the right, with street lamps providing warm illumination against the cool rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront dock area with warehouse buildings

events.description: walking past industrial dock structures and red and white barriers

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path past industrial buildings and dock areas, maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: person with patterned umbrella walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: wooden dock platforms with mooring posts and industrial equipment
bright red emergency life preserver box mounted on the riverside railing

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through a more industrial section of the waterfront, passing dock structures and a red life preserver box on the railing. The brick warehouse building looms closer on the right while the character continues along the rain-soaked paved path with the city skyline still visible across the dark water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit cafe terrace into an expansive, rain-soaked industrial waterfront. It begins under the purple glow of a cafe where the character performs a combat takedown against a brick wall before walking past metal tables and barrels to exit the sheltered area. As the character emerges into the open promenade, the scene expands to reveal Tower Bridge in the distance and heavy rain falling over the paved path and metal railings. The camera then follows the character past pedestrians with umbrellas and potted trees, shifting from the cool neon light toward the warm illumination of street lamps lining a historic brick warehouse. Finally, the environment becomes more industrial as the character passes dock structures and a red life preserver box, continuing along the wet pavement with the city skyline looming across the dark water.
